description: Add npm keywords and descriptions to the root package.json and all 7 platform package.json files to improve discoverability on npm search.

userStories.title: Add keywords and descriptions to root and platform package.json files
userStories.description: Add keywords array and description field to all 8 platform package.json files (root + 7 platform packages) for npm search discoverability. The root already has a description but no keywords. All 7 platform packages are missing both description and keywords.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json has a keywords array containing at least: opentabs, mcp, mcp-server, modelcontextprotocol, browser, chrome-extension, ai-agent
platform/mcp-server/package.json has description: 'MCP server that turns browser tabs into AI agent tools via a Chrome extension plugin system'
platform/mcp-server/package.json has keywords including: opentabs, mcp, mcp-server, modelcontextprotocol, ai-agent, browser, chrome-extension
platform/cli/package.json has a description and keywords array
platform/browser-extension/package.json has a description and keywords array
platform/plugin-sdk/package.json has a description and keywords array
platform/plugin-tools/package.json has a description and keywords array
platform/create-plugin/package.json has a description and keywords array
platform/shared/package.json has a description and keywords array
No other fields in any package.json are modified
userStories.notes:
Files:
- package.json (add keywords, keep existing description)
- platform/mcp-server/package.json (add description + keywords)
- platform/cli/package.json (add description + keywords)
- platform/browser-extension/package.json (add description + keywords)
- platform/plugin-sdk/package.json (add description + keywords)
- platform/plugin-tools/package.json (add description + keywords)
- platform/create-plugin/package.json (add description + keywords)
- platform/shared/package.json (add description + keywords)

Context:
These npm packages need keywords and descriptions for npm search discoverability. Top MCP packages get 50K-1.7M weekly downloads. The npm description is the landing page for anyone finding these packages through npm search. Currently the root has `"description": "Turns tabs into tools"` but no keywords, and all 7 platform packages are missing both fields entirely.

Changes:
Add the following to each package.json. Insert `description` right after `name` and `keywords` right after `description` (or after `version` if description already exists). Keep all existing fields unchanged.

1. **package.json** (root) — already has `"description": "Turns tabs into tools"`, just add keywords:
```json
"keywords": ["opentabs", "mcp", "mcp-server", "modelcontextprotocol", "browser", "chrome-extension", "ai-agent", "browser-automation", "plugin-system"]
```

2. **platform/mcp-server/package.json** — add after `"name"` line:
```json
"description": "MCP server that turns browser tabs into AI agent tools via a Chrome extension plugin system",
"keywords": ["opentabs", "mcp", "mcp-server", "modelcontextprotocol", "ai-agent", "browser", "chrome-extension", "tool-dispatch", "plugin-discovery"]
```

3. **platform/cli/package.json** — add after `"name"` line:
```json
"description": "CLI for OpenTabs — start the MCP server, manage plugins, and configure your AI agent browser bridge",
"keywords": ["opentabs", "mcp", "mcp-server", "modelcontextprotocol", "ai-agent", "browser", "chrome-extension", "cli"]
```

4. **platform/browser-extension/package.json** — add after `"name"` line:
```json
"description": "Chrome extension that bridges AI agents to web applications through the user's authenticated browser session",
"keywords": ["opentabs", "mcp", "modelcontextprotocol", "ai-agent", "browser", "chrome-extension", "manifest-v3", "browser-automation"]
```

5. **platform/plugin-sdk/package.json** — add after `"name"` line:
```json
"description": "SDK for building OpenTabs plugins — give AI agents tools to interact with any web application",
"keywords": ["opentabs", "mcp", "modelcontextprotocol", "ai-agent", "browser", "chrome-extension", "plugin-sdk", "opentabs-plugin"]
```

6. **platform/plugin-tools/package.json** — add after `"name"` line:
```json
"description": "Build tools for OpenTabs plugins — bundles adapters, generates tool schemas, and registers plugins",
"keywords": ["opentabs", "mcp", "modelcontextprotocol", "ai-agent", "browser", "chrome-extension", "plugin-tools", "opentabs-plugin"]
```

7. **platform/create-plugin/package.json** — add after `"name"` line:
```json
"description": "Scaffold a new OpenTabs plugin — create MCP tools that interact with web apps through the browser",
"keywords": ["opentabs", "mcp", "modelcontextprotocol", "ai-agent", "browser", "chrome-extension", "create-plugin", "scaffolding", "opentabs-plugin"]
```

8. **platform/shared/package.json** — add after `"name"` line:
```json
"description": "Shared types, constants, and utilities for the OpenTabs platform",
"keywords": ["opentabs", "mcp", "modelcontextprotocol", "ai-agent", "browser", "chrome-extension"]
```

Constraints:
- Do NOT modify any field other than adding description and keywords
- Do NOT change the root package.json's existing description ("Turns tabs into tools")
- Do NOT reorder or reformat existing fields — only add the new fields
- The root package.json is private: true, so its keywords are less critical, but still good practice
- Keep JSON formatting consistent with existing files (2-space indent)
